explanation: What I learned: I spend more time on social media on weekends because I have the time to use it. I am not sure yet if there is a correlation between my sleep in minutes compared to my social media usage in minutes. Plan for changes: I want to figure out more ways to represent my data graphically Barriers: I think my social media usage is still pretty low compared to what it used to be because I deleted TikTok. My steps are not fully accurate because I cannot wear my apple watch during lacrosse games

What I learned: I learned that the more active I am the longer I am able to sleep and the higher motivation I have for my academics Plan for changes: I want to find different ways to present my data clearly Barriers: I want to stay on top of tracking my academic performance, I forgot to track how motivated I did each day so it was more time consuming to look back on each assignment or try and remember.

What I learned: I Learned that my lack of sleep this past week really affected my focus academically but did not really affect my athletic performance Plan for changes: I updated the graph by switching everything to numeric scales to make the data easier to visualize. Sleep quality is now rated from 1–10 (1 = worst, 10 = best). Training load uses a 0–10 scale, where 0 represents an off day and 10 represents the hardest effort. Academic focus is now categorized on a 1–3 scale, with 1 = low, 2 = medium, and 3 = high. Barriers: Since this week and next week I have midterms coming up, the lack of sleep should go up after this week due to not having any barriers for spring break. I also feel this graph is very cluttered so I need to find a better way to organize my data to make it look clearer.
